Interface MailRepository

All Superinterfaces:
org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<Mail,Long>, org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Mail,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository<Mail,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListPagingAndSortingRepository<Mail,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.PagingAndSortingRepository<Mail,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor<Mail>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<Mail,Long>
public interface MailRepository extends org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Mail,Long>
Repository responsible for persistence operations related to Mail entities.

Used for managing recipient suggestions and communication history associated with application users.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<Mail>
    findBySenderEmailAndRecipientEmailAndUserId(String senderEmail, String recipientEmail, Long userId)
    Finds a sender-recipient relationship for a specific user.
    List<String>
    findRecentRecipientsByAccount(Long userId, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)
    Retrieves the most recently used recipients across all user accounts.
    List<String>
    findRecentRecipientsByEmail(Long userId, String senderEmail, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)
    Retrieves the most recently used recipients for a given sender address.

  • Method Details

    • findBySenderEmailAndRecipientEmailAndUserId

      Optional<Mail> findBySenderEmailAndRecipientEmailAndUserId(String senderEmail, String recipientEmail, Long userId)
      Finds a sender-recipient relationship for a specific user.
      Parameters:
      senderEmail - sender email address
      recipientEmail - recipient email address
      userId - user identifier
      Returns:
      matching relationship if found

    • findRecentRecipientsByEmail

      @Query("SELECT m.recipientEmail FROM Mail m WHERE m.user.id = :userId AND m.senderEmail = :senderEmail GROUP BY m.recipientEmail ORDER BY MAX(m.sentDate) DESC") List<String> findRecentRecipientsByEmail(@Param("userId") Long userId, @Param("senderEmail") String senderEmail, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)
      Retrieves the most recently used recipients for a given sender address.
      Parameters:
      userId - user identifier
      senderEmail - sender email address
      pageable - pagination information
      Returns:
      list of recipient email addresses

    • findRecentRecipientsByAccount

      @Query("SELECT m.recipientEmail FROM Mail m WHERE m.user.id = :userId GROUP BY m.recipientEmail ORDER BY MAX(m.sentDate) DESC") List<String> findRecentRecipientsByAccount(@Param("userId") Long userId, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)
      Retrieves the most recently used recipients across all user accounts.
      Parameters:
      userId - user identifier
      pageable - pagination information
      Returns:
      list of recipient email addresses
